intel.title: [CISA KEV] Mirasvit Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer - Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-45247
廠商: Mirasvit
產品: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer
漏洞名稱: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
說明: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote code execution by supplying a crafted serialized PHP object in the CacheWarmer cookie.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-06
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer 存在反序列化漏洞（CVE-2026-45247），未經授權的攻擊者可透過在 CacheWarmer Cookie 中傳送惡意的 PHP 序列化對象來執行遠端程式碼（RCE）。此漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知遭利用漏洞清單（KEV），但由於公司並未部署此產品，因此無直接影響。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
